title: Sunset Beach Proposal
description: Walk on the beach as the sun sets, write 'Will you be mine?' in the sand with rose petals leading to it

title: Starlit Rooftop
description: Set up fairy lights and candles on a rooftop, play your favorite song, and ask under the stars

title: Photo Memory Lane
description: Create a path with photos of your favorite memories together, ending with 'One more memory to make?'

title: Scavenger Hunt
description: Create clues leading to special places, each with a reason why you love her, final clue leads to you with flowers

title: Candlelit Home Dinner
description: Cook her favorite meal, set up candles and roses, play soft music, and ask over dessert
